hypothesis: A hierarchical two-stage ∆-learning pipeline that first learns the GFN1-xTB→PBE correction and then the PBE→HSE06 correction, trained with the same total number of HSE06 labels as a single-stage xTB→HSE06 model, will reduce the HSE06 band-gap MAE for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 25% relative to the single-stage approach.
